roles.core: central bot, D1 authority, payment callbacks, report outbox and Durable Object live usage engine
roles.edge: reseller bots, customer miniapps and imported-subscription lifecycle
roles.processor: optional advanced schedules, backups, campaigns and background reports

core: LIVE_USAGE_COORDINATOR -> class LiveUsageCoordinator (required for cron-free live usage)

features: representative usage is calculated autonomously by Durable Object alarms without user activity or cron triggers
default live cycle is 15 seconds and is configurable from 8 to 300 seconds
the coordinator processes central PasarGuard agencies and downline reseller bots in fair updated_at batches
central billing_events and downline reseller_usage_events guard against duplicate deductions
concurrent live, manual and fallback syncs cannot charge the same downline usage delta twice
zero-balance agency suspension and automatic reactivation reconciliation run after every live cycle
live engine starts automatically on the first central Worker request and keeps rescheduling itself
the central Worker can auto-provision the Durable Object binding when Cloudflare deployment credentials are stored
admin status/start/run/stop/provision control is available at /api/admin/usage/live
central health reports whether LIVE_USAGE_COORDINATOR is bound
the existing central cron remains only as a fallback when the Durable Object binding is absent and for non-live maintenance jobs
subscription import, CubePay, Plisio, automatic USD rates and report topics are preserved

deployment.automatic_provisioning: supported when cf_account_id, cf_api_token and cf_worker_name are already saved and the token can update Workers scripts
deployment.activation: after deployment open /health once or send any message to the central bot; after binding deployment the next request starts the alarm loop
deployment.cron: the existing 10-minute central cron can remain; it is not used for live usage while the Durable Object binding is active

validation.duplicate_downline_billing_guard: implemented with INSERT OR IGNORE transaction gate
validation.archive_structure: passed: core, edge, processor, version, release manifest and Durable Object config; no README
validation.live_cloudflare_pasarguard_test: not run because live deployment credentials and production panel access were not available
